locations.novigrad: Novigrad – A bustling city of merchants, bards, and political intrigue where the dispute between Sapkowski and the Guild first erupted.
locations.guild_hall: Guild Hall – A grand building where the Guild of Red Projects holds its meetings and manages its affairs.

items.negotiator_note: Negotiator Note – A note detailing the missing negotiators and their last known whereabouts.

characters.mysterious_client: Mysterious Client – A shadowy figure who hires the witcher to investigate the disappearances.
characters.guild_representative: Guild Representative – A confident and calculating negotiator representing the Guild of Red Projects.

action_text.unlock-path: I unlock a new path from ${from} to ${to} with ${item}.
